author: Zvážený ovčan
title: Ani se neprihlasi k NAS
content: Priserny, nedokaze se ani prihlasit k lepe zabezpecene NAS, delete

author: SetapouchJr
title: Rating Flacboxu
content: Nemám na co si stěžovat, vše funguje jak má. Má to prostě všechno

author: 7REBELS
title: The Best … Ever
content: Absoluttelly ❤️‍🔥

author: Snapshooter2013
title: Playlist privlem
content: Cannot create new playlist after latest update..

author: h947cz
title: Skvělá aplikace na poslech uložených písniček
content: Dlouho jsem hledal aplikaci, přes kterou si můžu poslechnout písničky uložené v telefonu bez nutnosti používání aplikace Soubory (protože tam nejde přeskakovat mezi písněmi a má bugy) a tahle aplikace je skvělá. Použití je zdarma a reklam je tam tak akorát. Reklamy nezastavují a nepřerušují poslech hudby. Možnost vytvoření playlistu. Pro mě super a doporučuji. Má jednoduché prostředí.

author: MISHOX
title: Hudebni powertool
content: Používám k synchronizaci hudby mezi NÁS a iOS

author: RoLi Lisicky
title: Geniální přehrávač hudby a nejen online
content: Parádní přehrávač a to co jsem hledal , Umí přehrát offline hudbu ze složky kterou mám na telefonu jednoduché ovládání po chvíli se člověk zorientuje kde která věc je, úplně skvělé.

author: Josef K,
title: It doesn’t work any more
content: I was happy with app for a couple of years. After update to 4.4 version it crashes just after start.

author: Ronoath
title: Výborná aplikace
content: Skvělá aplikace. V iPadu mi rozhraní připadá skvělé, u iPhone je méně přehledné, ale pořád bez větších připomínek. Mám vše, co potřebuji a nelituji ani koruny za prémiovou verzi.

author: ZdenieCzech
title: Missing some stuff
content: The app is great. But I'm missing possibility to search the albums / folders by letter in Car Play like in phone list, for example. And also, it would be appreciated to play folder by folder instead of rolling the songs within the same folder around and around.

author: hombre9090
title: Spicka
content: Spickovy prehravac. Obrovske moznosti pripojeni ke cloudovym sluzbam. Nejlepsi player, jaky jsem v zivote mel od Winampu.

author: mirek zatko
title: Vinikajicí aplikace!
content: Děkuji nelituji!!

author: UjcoCZ
title: Dobrý offline player
content: Dobry offline player pro hudbu, která není na Apple Music dostupná a hlavně jednoduchý import MP3 bez nutnosti priserneho iTunes!

author: yeeshkul
title: Freezes an crashes
content:
iOS 14. The app freezes when minimized and the maximized. It sometimes crashes.
The wifi drive doesn’t work repeatedly unless you restart your phone.

author: Pindourek123
title: pain.
content: i'm so sad that they are making the features such as creating playlist, downloading artwork, etc. for premium only. I miss the old flacbox, the full of joy, no need to pay for anything flacbox :(

author: HiQSounder
title: All files player and data storage - best ever in every way
content: Best ever all files player. Period. Keep doing such a good job guys.

author: darreback
title: K ničemu
content: Popár sekundách poslechu se vypne celá aplikace. Iphone 8

author: Michal D.
title: Nepřehrává flac soubory / Can’t play flac files
content:
Stále nepřehrává audio soubory flac z úložiště Google Drive!

Still can’t play flac files from Google Drive!

author: FeylGD
title: Excellent music player
content: Flacbox is by far the best music player for iOS. It has better UI than Apple Music and Spotify, it’s rich with features and works great. The only issue I have is, that when a song stops playing I have to manually tap to play the next song. If I could have one wish it would be the addition of Czech language.

author: Luboš Kolouch
title: Carplay
content:
So nice that you added carplay!

I have just a small issue with it though - after each song it stops playing and I have to press continue playback...

author: Maxim_w
title: Perfect
content: The best music player. Disabling download of album covers is killer-feature. I was searching it for a long time.

author: Ruyaaa
title: Wow
content: Such rich functionalities in single IOS app ? Wow! I’ve some issues with czech characters which splits albums into more pieces (it’ll create more albums even if all songs are in single directory) and also you have to watch closely your songs download (into device) because it hangs often but otherwise i was really surprised how good the app is. No more anoying sync via itunes !

author: Legox
title: Best solution for FLACs in the cloud.
content: If you have tons of FLACs in cloud services (for example in MEGA), you can hardly find better solution.

author: Algorim1
title: Great
content: Excellent tool, wide support of cloud services, perfect UI, really great

author: AlejoDanza
title: Excellent!!!
content: Easy to use, full options are available to use the player with home NAS.
